title: Junior Business Development Manager at Wadhwa Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Wadhwa Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!
